emoteReactionsDesc: Show emoji reactions from other players during multiplayer games.
confirmStartDailyWarning: Don't leave the app or background the game. Leaving disqualifies your run.
dailyAlreadyDisqualifiedDesc: Today's run was disqualified because you backgrounded the app during the game. You can try again with tomorrow's challenge.
dailyDisqualifiedDesc: You left the app during the challenge. Keep playing - you'll still see your score and how you compare, but this run can't be added to the leaderboard or your streak.
dailyDisqualifiedRibbon: ⚠️ This run was disqualified - app backgrounded during the game
enjoyGameplay: Enjoy 30 minutes of uninterrupted gameplay after this ad break
streakStarted: You have a 1 day login streak! Log in daily to grow your streak!
videoAdThanks: Thanks for helping us keep WorldGuessr free by watching video ads!
watchAnAdToRestore: Watch a short ad to restore your streak.
notConnectedReopenApp: You are not connected to the server. Closing and re-opening the app can help.
usernameFlaggedMobileExplanation: Your username has been flagged as inappropriate. You can still play singleplayer, but multiplayer is disabled until your new name is approved.
usernameFlaggedGoToProfileTab: Your username has been flagged. Please change it from the Profile tab.
appleNoSignInToken: Apple did not return a sign in token.
googleNoSignInToken: Google did not return a sign in token.
appleSignInFailed: Apple sign in failed. Please try again.
queueLeftDisconnect: Connection lost — you've left the queue.
queueJoinFailed: Couldn't join the queue. Please try again.
errorRequestTimedOut: Request timed out. Check your connection and try again.
errorNetworkRequest: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
usernameLengthError: Username must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters
usernameRulesHint: {{min}}-{{max}} characters, letters, numbers, and underscores only
errorBoundaryMessage: The app hit an unexpected error. You can try again or go back home.
